        .banner-2025 .deferred-media {

      <style>
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-menu-header {
          cursor: pointer;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-menu .sticky-menu-logo {
          text-align: center;
          background-color: #fff;
          padding: 20px 0 0;
        }
        .shopify-section-header-sticky .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-menu .sticky-menu-logo {
          padding: 5px
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-menu .sticky-menu-logo img {
          display: block;
          margin: 0 auto;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-nav-wrapper {
          padding: 30px 16.5px;
          background-color: #fff;
          position: absolute;
          width: 100%;
          top: 60px;
          left: 0;
          opacity: 0;
          visibility: hidden;
          transform: translateY(-100%);
          translate: all 0.5s;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-nav-wrapper.item-active {
          opacity: 1;
          visibility: visible;
          transform: translateY(0);
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-nav-wrapper .sticky-link-list {
          max-width: 360px;
          margin: 0 auto;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-nav-wrapper ul {
          padding-left: 0;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-nav-wrapper .sticky-link-list li {
          list-style: none;
          margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-nav-wrapper .sticky-link-list > li {
          margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-nav-wrapper .sticky-link-list > li:last-child {
          margin-bottom: 0;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-link-list .parent-link-item {
          font-size: 14px;
          font-weight: 400;
          font-size: 14px;
          line-height: 1;
          letter-spacing: 0.04em;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          display: block;
          text-align: left;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-link-list .child-link-item {
          margin-top: 10px;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-link-list .child-link-item {
          font-weight: 400;
          font-size: 18px;
          line-height: 1.3;
          letter-spacing: -0.02em;
          text-decoration: underline;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 10px;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-link-list .child-link-item:hover {
          text-decoration: none;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-link-list .child-link-item > * {
          display: block;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-logo {
          position: fixed;
          left: 50%;
          transform: translateX(-50%);
          top: 230px;
          max-width: 100%;
          width: 100%;
          padding: 20px;
          transition: opacity 0.4s ease, transform 0.4s ease;
        }
        .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-logo.showed {
          display: none!important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
          .sticky-logo-nav .sticky-logo {
            max-width: 55%;
          }
        }
        .section-header .sticky-menu {
          opacity: 0;
          visibility: hidden;
          height: 0;
        }
        .shopify-section-header-sticky.section-sticky-logo:not(.no-scrolled) .sticky-menu {
          opacity: 1;
          visibility: visible;
          height: auto;
        }
        div.section-header.shopify-section-group-header-group.section-sticky-logo {
          z-index: 8;
          visibility: hidden;
        }
        .shopify-section-header-sticky.section-sticky-logo:not(.no-scrolled) {
          top: calc(var(--header-height) - 0px);
          visibility: visible;
        }
        .shopify-section-header-hidden.section-sticky-logo:not(.no-scrolled) {
          top: 0;
          z-index: 10!important;
          visibility: visible;
        }
      </style>

      :root {
        --font-body-family: "nimbus-sans", sans-serif;
        --font-body-style: normal;
        --font-body-weight: 400;
        --font-body-weight-bold: 700;

        --font-body-family: "nimbus-sans", sans-serif;
        --font-heading-style: normal;
        --font-heading-weight: 400;

        --font-body-scale: 1.0;
        --font-heading-scale: 1.0;

        --media-padding: px;
        --media-border-opacity: 0.05;
        --media-border-width: 1px;
        --media-radius: 0px;
        --media-shadow-opacity: 0.0;
        --media-shadow-horizontal-offset: 0px;
        --media-shadow-vertical-offset: 4px;
        --media-shadow-blur-radius: 5px;
        --media-shadow-visible: 0;

        --page-width: 120rem;
        --page-width-margin: 0rem;

        --product-card-image-padding: 0.0rem;
        --product-card-corner-radius: 0.0rem;
        --product-card-text-alignment: left;
        --product-card-border-width: 0.0rem;

    <script>
      (function() {
        var lastKnownCartCount = null;

        window.addEventListener('pageshow', function(event) {
          refreshCartUI();
          
        });

        function refreshCartUI() {
          fetch('/cart.js')
            .then(function(response) { return response.json(); })
            .then(function(cart) {
              var bubbleCount = document.querySelector('#cart-icon-bubble .cart-count-bubble span[aria-hidden="true"]');
              if (bubbleCount) {
                bubbleCount.textContent = '[' + cart.item_count + ']';
              }

              var hiddenCount = document.querySelector('#cart-icon-bubble .cart-count-bubble .visually-hidden');
              if (hiddenCount) {
                hiddenCount.textContent = cart.item_count + ' items';
              }

              var drawerCount = document.getElementById('cart-count-drawer');
              if (drawerCount) {
                drawerCount.textContent = cart.item_count;
              }

              var cartNumber = document.getElementById('cart-number');
              if (cartNumber) {
                cartNumber.textContent = cart.item_count;
              }

              refreshCartDrawerSections();
            })
            .catch(function(err) {
              console.error('Error refreshing cart:', err);
            });
        }

        function refreshCartDrawerSections() {
          var sectionsToRender = [
            { id: 'cart-drawer', selector: '#cart-content' },
            { id: 'cart-icon-bubble' }
          ];

          var sectionIds = sectionsToRender.map(function(section) { 
            return section.id; 
          }).join(',');

          fetch(window.Shopify.routes.root + '?sections=' + sectionIds)
            .then(function(response) { return response.json(); })
            .then(function(parsedSections) {
              sectionsToRender.forEach(function(section) {
                var sectionElement = section.selector
                  ? document.querySelector(section.selector)
                  : document.getElementById(section.id);

                if (sectionElement && parsedSections[section.id]) {
                  var tempDiv = document.createElement('div');
                  tempDiv.innerHTML = parsedSections[section.id];
                  var newContent = tempDiv.querySelector(section.selector || '.shopify-section');
                  
                  if (newContent) {
                    sectionElement.innerHTML = newContent.innerHTML;
                  }
                }
              });
            })
            .catch(function(err) {
              console.error('Error refreshing cart sections:', err);
            });
        }
      })();
    </script>

<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    function isIE() {
      const ua = window.navigator.userAgent;
      const msie = ua.indexOf('MSIE ');
      const trident = ua.indexOf('Trident/');

      return msie > 0 || trident > 0;
    }

    if (!isIE()) return;
    const cartSubmitInput = document.createElement('input');
    cartSubmitInput.setAttribute('name', 'checkout');
    cartSubmitInput.setAttribute('type', 'hidden');
    document.querySelector('#cart').appendChild(cartSubmitInput);
    document.querySelector('#checkout').addEventListener('click', function (event) {
      document.querySelector('#cart').submit();
    });
  });
</script>

  document.getElementById('cart-icon-bubble').addEventListener('click', function(e) {

  const drawerCount = document.getElementById('cart-count-drawer');
  
  if (bubbleCount && drawerCount) {
    const countText = bubbleCount.textContent;
    const count = countText.replace(/[\[\]]/g, '').trim();
    
    // Update drawer count
    drawerCount.textContent = count;
  }
});
